prompt:
Subject:
leaf shadows falling on blue

Main Subject:
A 4:5 vertical photo. Large view of a bright blue pavement with a natural and cute-looking adult woman walking in the lower center. Full body shown, occupying about 35% of the screen. Dark green tree branches and leaves enter from the top right, and large dappled sunlight shadows spread across the pavement. A single thin leaf floats in the wind slightly above and to the right of the person.

Person/Expression:
Black medium-length hair tied low, with thin bangs and stray hairs around the face blowing lightly in the wind. Skin has natural brightness with a hint of flush on the cheeks. Gentle eyes with natural Japanese-style makeup. Face turned upward, smiling slightly as if looking up at the camera. Expression is not overdone, capturing a natural cuteness as if noticing something during a summer walk.

Clothing/Pose:
white short-sleeved puff-sleeve blouse and a light blue floral long skirt. The skirt is made of light material, with the hem fluttering as she walks. White high-top sneakers on feet. An off-white canvas tote bag on the left shoulder, holding a blue book to the chest with both hands. Captured at the moment the right foot steps forward, with the shadow falling to the lower left of the feet.

Background/Light:
Midsummer outdoors, vivid blue paved road. Shiny green leaves and branches with small white flowers overlap on the right, with most of the background consisting of the blue ground and leaf shadows. The sun shines strongly from a high position at the top left, creating bright highlights on shoulders, hair, blouse, and the top of the skirt. Tree shadows have varying depth and bleed slightly along the unevenness of the ground.

Composition/Camera:
High-angle overhead shot. Figure in the lower center, with a wide blue margin and shadows of branches in the upper half. A white line enters diagonally at the bottom left, adding depth and rhythm. Focus on the face and upper body, background is lightly and naturally blurred. Natural 85mm compression feel, professional magazine quality.

Texture/Style:
Realistic photographic expression. Carefully depicts translucent summer sunlight, natural skin texture, fabric thinness, skirt movement, and the fine grain of the pavement. Colors are primarily blue and white, with green leaves as accents. Bright and clean, avoiding excessive skin smoothing or artificial textures.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, poor contact with the book, floating bag, unnatural gravity, wrong perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, garbled text, logos, watermarks, excessive skin smoothing, plastic-like skin.
